execution_stress.comparison: LT4/LD2 current live vs LT6/LBE4 previous live
execution_stress.read: Positive deltas mean LT4/LD2 still beats LT6/LBE4 under that extra penalty. Penalties are applied on top of the average visible-spread model.

latest_block.reason: Entry preflight blocked: buy/long entry book moved 6.6867 bp from reference, max is 5.0000 bp.

historical_time_filter.read: Checks whether simple UTC hour/weekday exclusions improve LT4/LD2 under both normal and pessimistic same-candle trailing assumptions. Candidates must improve PF in both modes without cutting more than 8 net percentage points.

intrabar_stress.read: Conservative mode allows a newly activated break-even/trailing stop to be hit on the same 1m candle. This is intentionally pessimistic for ambiguous intrabar order.

live_forward_edge_diagnostics.read: Forward-only diagnostic on actual published bot trades. Use as a watchlist, not a live rule, until sample size is larger.

live_suggested_filter_historical_check.read: Historical check of live-forward suggested causal filters. Uses only signal-candle features.

lt4_ld2_exit_net_guard_scan.read: Exit-only LT4/LD2 scan. Top paper result is a microscopic long-trail tweak, so it is not auto-promoted. Practical candidate is the short no-progress exit.
lt4_ld2_exit_net_guard_scan.selection_note: Current live LT4/LD2 exit-only scan. Promotion requires avg-spread net, PF, avg trade, 2bp PF, and drawdown to be no worse in both normal and conservative same-bar modes.

meta.public_notice: No API keys, account index, order IDs, client IDs, or raw exchange payloads are included.

net_preserving_regime_scan.read: Trade-level diagnostic for net-preserving regime filters on current LT4/LD2. Strict candidates must improve PF in normal and pessimistic intrabar modes, keep net within 2 points, and not worsen drawdown. Watch candidates allow small net sacrifice for PF.

promotion_candidate.caution: Promoted candidate: same entries/sizing/guards as LT6/LBE4, but long trailing activates at 0.004% with 0.002% distance. Follow-up full-period scan improved net/PF/2bp stress PF without increasing drawdown, and live-overlap was positive.

strategy_overlap.note: Overlap uses existing live trades only and is a promotion warning, not proof.
